assertions_verified.evidence: scenarios.json contains 20 entries; every entry has scenario_id, description, available_actions (length >= 2), gto_action (member of available_actions), gto_explanation (>= 100 chars), lesson_tag.
scenarios.js exports getScenarioById, listScenarios, sampleNScenarios. sampleNScenarios uses mulberry32 seeded by a hash of rngSeed; identical inputs produce identical outputs.

JSDoc typedefs for Scenario, PlayerSubmission, GameConfig, GameDocument, PushSubscriptionRecord declared here as the canonical types; consumed downstream by sections 2/3/4/5/6 by import of this module's API.
No 'gto-poker-trainer' string in scenarios.js or scenarios.json.
sampleNScenarios(5, 'seed-abc') is pure: mulberry32 seeded by hashStringToUint32('seed-abc') produces identical Fisher-Yates results across calls.
